message:
fix(reactor): browser wake() coalescing bug on empty registry

BrowserReactor::wake() left wake_pending=true when snapshot_readiness_events()
returned empty (no registrations). This caused subsequent wake() calls — after
registrations were added — to be incorrectly coalesced away, silently dropping
the wakeup.

Fix: clear wake_pending when the snapshot is empty so future wakes are not
suppressed.

Also: fix existing coalesce_flag test to match corrected behavior, add
dedicated regression test, fmt cleanup in wasm_abi_handle_lifecycle_contract.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
